title: Recycle Iron
description: This mod allows you to smelt down items that have been made of iron or gold ingots.
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/)

Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay!

This mod allows you to smelt down items that have been made of iron or gold ingots.
Vanilla Minecraft has added some of these features, so I removed the tool and armor smelting recipes.
You can now smelt down other things like buckets, rails, iron bars, or anything made with at least one iron ingot and get an ingot or nugget back.
Gold items and blocks can also be smelted down for gold ingots and nuggets.
